free_text: Excitation functions of deuteron induced nuclear
reactions on natural tellurium and enriched 122-Te:
Production of 123-I via the 122-Te(d,n) 123-I-process
. Short report.
.The compact cyclotron CV28.
.The incident energy CV28 was 14.MeV,
one 'Julic' was 50.MeV.
- The beam current was
monitored.
Several vanadium (99% pure) and aluminum (99.9%
pure) foils were inserted at several intervals in the
stacks to allow beam current determination and the
required energy degradation.
.It was used for 125-I.
. By CAJAD.
.Stopping power
table.
The method of target preparation. The device for
high current beam.
An electroplating method was developed to obtain thin
tellurium samples. Titanium foils of 25 mu-m and
10 mu-m thickness were used as backing material.
S.M.Qaim (2018-01-24): Some of the points near the
threshold appear to be shifted since the energy
calibration of the cyclotron at that time was not
very good.
BIB section updated
Corrections were made according new EXFOR rules.
SD: 'and' deleted from author's list; ref.
C,82ANTWER,909, -> C,82ANTWER,,909,1982. Data were
re-digitized in all Subents. BIB update. COMMENT added.
ANALYSIS 'AREA' deleted. ERR-ANALYS update. Subent 007
deleted (dupl. with 006).
Several stacks of natural tellurium each consisting
of about 6 Ti-Te discs, were irradiated.
Tellurium films of 6.-7. mu-m thickness, corresponding
to a tellurium weight of 4.- 4.5 mg/cm were used.
The total errors in the measured cross
sections were estimated by taking square roots of
the sums of the squares of the individual errors,
such as those occurring in the determination of
the thickness of each Ti-foil and tellurium-film, in
beam current measurements, in the determination of
the absolute activity of samples ( including
statistical errors, errors in the efficiency  of the
detector, counting geometry and decay schemes etc.),
as well as errors in the energy scale
calculations. The total errors in cross sections
vary from  case to case, but in general lie between
Fig. 1 from ARI,34,1425.
SD: Data re-digitized. SAMPLE, STATUS were
added.COMMENT deleted (information moved to ERR-ANALYS)
EN-ERR -> EN-ERR-DIG. RAD-DET deleted. SF5=IND -> (CUM)
in REACTION code.
